calculatedFields.caption: % Diff Sales per Customers
calculatedFields.formula: ([CY Profit (copy)_3221481164532895746] - [CY Sales per Customer (copy)_3221481164533485572]) / [CY Sales per Customer (copy)_3221481164533485572]

calculatedFields.caption: PY Customers
calculatedFields.formula:
IF YEAR([Order Date])= [Parameters].[Parameter 1]-1 THEN [Customer ID] 
END

calculatedFields.caption: CY Customers
calculatedFields.formula:
IF YEAR([Order Date])= [Parameters].[Parameter 1] THEN [Customer ID] 
END

calculatedFields.caption: CY Orders
calculatedFields.formula:
IF YEAR([Order Date]) = [Parameters].[Parameter 1] THEN [Order ID]
END

calculatedFields.caption: KPI CY Less PY
calculatedFields.formula:
IF SUM([Calculation_721701895334993921]) < SUM([CY Sales (copy)_721701895335804930]) THEN '⬤'
ELSE ''
END

calculatedFields.caption: Min/Max Sales
calculatedFields.formula:
IF SUM([Calculation_721701895334993921]) = WINDOW_MAX(SUM([Calculation_721701895334993921]))
THEN SUM([Calculation_721701895334993921])
ELSEIF SUM([Calculation_721701895334993921]) = WINDOW_MIN(SUM([Calculation_721701895334993921]))
THEN SUM([Calculation_721701895334993921])
END

calculatedFields.caption: KPI Profit Avg
calculatedFields.formula:
IF SUM([CY Sales (copy)_237846410424180736]) > WINDOW_AVG(SUM([CY Sales (copy)_237846410424180736]))
THEN 'Above'
ELSE 'Below'
END

calculatedFields.caption: Min/Max Sales Per Customers
calculatedFields.formula:
IF [CY Profit (copy)_3221481164532895746] = WINDOW_MAX([CY Profit (copy)_3221481164532895746])
THEN [CY Profit (copy)_3221481164532895746] 
ELSEIF [CY Profit (copy)_3221481164532895746] = WINDOW_MIN([CY Profit (copy)_3221481164532895746])
THEN [CY Profit (copy)_3221481164532895746]
END
